mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chemical_stock_detail WHERE status = 'available' AND expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(expiry_date, NOW()) BETWEEN 0 AND #{days} ORDER BY expiry_date ASC
SELECT * FROM chemical_stock_detail WHERE expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND expiry_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY expiry_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE chemical_stock_detail SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE chemical_stock_detail SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
